reviews.comment:
Último servicio antes del Bolsón. Café de maquina. Limpieza y un completo kiosco.

(Translated by Google)
Last service before El Bolsón. Machine coffee. Cleaning and a fully stocked kiosk.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNeGNtM3hRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Horrible !! Llegamos allí el viernes primero de Noviembre a las 21 horas. La señora que nos atendió dijo que estaba cerrado y no nos quiso ni abrir los baños ! Apago todas las luces !! Mañana iré al Automóvil Club a hacer la denuncia pertinente.

(Translated by Google)
Horrible!! We arrived there on Friday, November 1st at 9 PM. The woman who attended to us said it was closed and wouldn't even open the restrooms for us! She turned off all the lights!! Tomorrow I'm going to the Automobile Club to file a complaint.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwanRXT3JBRRAB

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwb3FTT0lREAE

reviews.comment:
Ubicado en un lugar soñado. Muy lindo. Cuidado: si se queda sin nafta o si está el camion cargando se hace una fila interminable de autos, porque no hay otra en muchos km. En el var me atendió una anciana muy fastidiosa.

(Translated by Google)
Located in a dreamlike spot. Very nice. Beware: if you run out of gas or if the truck is refueling, there's an endless line of cars because there's no other gas station for miles around. At the gas station, I was served by a very annoying old woman.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwamFfR2pnRRAB
